com.saxonica.ee.stream

Class TemplateInversion

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.ee.stream.TemplateInversion

  • public class TemplateInversion
extends java.lang.Object
    This class represents the inversion of a template body

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TemplateInversion(Template originalTemplate)
      Create the Jackson inversion of a template, allowing the template to execute on a streamed input source.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void explain(ExpressionPresenter presenter)
      Output diagnostic explanation to an ExpressionPresenter
      Component getDeclaringComponent() 
      Template getOriginalTemplate()
      Get the original template of which this is an inversion
      SlotManager getStackFrame()
      Get the stackframe identifying the slots used for local variables
      Watch getWatch(WatchManager wm, Feed result, XPathContext context)
      Get a Watch associated with this template, if any.
      void invert()
      Invert the body of the template.
      void setStackFrame(SlotManager frame)
      Set the stackframe identifying the slots used for local variables

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • TemplateInversion

        public TemplateInversion(Template originalTemplate)
        Create the Jackson inversion of a template, allowing the template to execute on a streamed input source.
        Parameters:
        originalTemplate - the template to be inverted

    • Method Detail

      • getWatch

        public Watch getWatch(WatchManager wm,
             Feed result,
             XPathContext context)
               throws XPathException
        Get a Watch associated with this template, if any. This creates a watch to implement the "drill-down" instruction of the inverted template, for example if the drill-down instruction is CopyOfFeed with that expression as its selection.
        Parameters:
        wm - the WatchManager which keeps track of all active Watches
        result - the destination for the output of this Watch
        context - the stack of dynamic context objects for the active Watches
        Returns:
        the Watch if there is one, or null otherwise.
        Throws:
        XPathException - if an error occurs

      • getOriginalTemplate

        public Template getOriginalTemplate()
        Get the original template of which this is an inversion
        Returns:
        the original template

      • getDeclaringComponent

        public Component getDeclaringComponent()

      • invert

        public void invert()
            throws XPathException
        Invert the body of the template.
        Throws:
        XPathException - if the template is non-streamable

      • setStackFrame

        public void setStackFrame(SlotManager frame)
        Set the stackframe identifying the slots used for local variables
        Parameters:
        frame - the stack frame skeleton

      • getStackFrame

        public SlotManager getStackFrame()
        Get the stackframe identifying the slots used for local variables
        Returns:
        the stack frame skeleton

      • explain

        public void explain(ExpressionPresenter presenter)
        Output diagnostic explanation to an ExpressionPresenter
        Parameters:
        presenter - the destination for the output
